tldr: Paul Seixas took the 13.8 km hilly ITT in Bilbao by 23 seconds over Vauquelin and 27 over Großschartner — the 19-year-old becoming the youngest WorldTour stage race leader of the year. Ayuso lost 1:16 in a defining early GC hit.

narrative.headline: Seixas takes the leader's jersey
narrative.body: Hilly 13.8 km ITT. Seixas posted the fastest time of the day, beating every billed GC favourite. Roglič 4th at +28; Großschartner the second man ever to defeat Roglič at an Itzulia TT.

gcImpact.headline: Seixas into yellow
gcImpact.body: First WorldTour stage race leader's jersey of his career. Holds it most of the week.

riderPerformances.name: Paul Seixas
riderPerformances.narrative: Third major GC-relevant performance of the spring after Strade Bianche second. Took the Stage 1 ITT in Bilbao by 23 seconds — first WorldTour stage race leader's jersey of his career.
